case_title: THE CITY TOW VS DANIELLY, THOMAS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELLY, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELLY, THOMAS
AMENDED POS AS TO DEFT THOMAS DANIELLY FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELLY, THOMAS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,570.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DANIELLY, THOMAS HEARING SET FOR FEB-04-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-04-1999, GRANTED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-11-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-01-1999 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DANIELLY, THOMAS PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RELEASE DEFENDNAT'S 1984 BUICK REGAL TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
